meaning: n.恶意,怨恨,预谋,蓄意犯罪
examples: He was actuated entirely by malice.
He did it of [out of; through] malice.
De Jong was booked for the challenge, but he insisted there was no malice intended.
He will send out undefeated Verrazano, Overanalyze, Revolutionary, Palace Malice and Charming Kitten in the Derby.
